title: Aligarh
subTitle: Ramchandra Siras, a professor on whom a sting operation is carried out to determine his sexual orientation, forms a special bond with the journalist who covers his story.

title: Kadvi Hawa
subTitle: A blind old man, worried about the survival and well-being of his son, decides to strike a deal with a debt collector to prevent his child from falling into a debt trap.

title: Dhaakad
subTitle: Despite her reservations, Agent Agni takes up the mission to track and capture Rudraveer, a trafficker in India. However, the assignment soon takes her down unnavigated routes.

title: India Lockdown
subTitle: The lives of four individuals - a father, his pilot daughter, a prostitute, and a migrant worker - are thrown into turmoil when the Indian government announces a nationwide lockdown.

title: U-Turn
subTitle: A journalist investigating traffic offenders on a flyover becomes embroiled in an investigation after being accused of murdering one of the motorcyclists.

title: Karthik Calling Karthik
subTitle: Karthik leads a taxing life as a scorned office worker until his own voice offers him the key to love and prosperity over a series of early morning phone calls.

title: Fitoor
subTitle: Noor, a Kashmiri boy from a poor family, is hired as a stable keeper by a begum. Later, when he begins to fall in love with Firdaus, the begum's daughter, she separates them by sending her away.

title: Satyaprem Ki Katha
subTitle: Satyaprem tries hard to prove himself as a worthy person and restore the faith in the love of Khata, who is overwhelmed by her breakup.

title: Naam Shabana
subTitle: Shabhana, desperate for justice, agrees to join a secret intelligence agency in exchange for their help in unmasking her friend's murderer.

title: Don 2
subTitle: Trouble awaits Don as the European drug cartel bosses plan his downfall. However, new allies and former foes promise to aid him in the challenging times.

title: Fukrey 3
subTitle: The Fukras plan to take over Delhi and run for city elections. However, they have no money, so they take on an international job to make a quick buck, which changes their lives forever.

title: Happy Bhag Jayegi
subTitle: Happy, a vibrant Indian girl, elopes on the day of her wedding so that she can marry Guddu, the man she loves. However, she mistakenly arrives at the home of a Pakistani politician where chaos ensues.

title: Happy Bhag Jayegi
subTitle: Happy, a vibrant Indian girl, elopes on the day of her wedding so that she can marry Guddu, the man she loves. However, she mistakenly arrives at the home of a Pakistani politician where chaos ensues.

title: Waah Zindagi
subTitle: A struggling farmer's son sets out to become an entrepreneur and win over his childhood love. However, foreign businesses threaten to ruin his path to success.

title: Holiday
subTitle: Muskaan, an unpopular, shy girl, falls for Dino, a charismatic dancer, while on a vacation in Goa with her family. However, things become complicated when her father objects to their relationship.

title: Sniff
subTitle: Sunny, who lacks the sense of smell, finds his olfactory abilities enhanced after becoming a victim of a laboratory accident, which turns him into a superhero.

title: State Of Siege: Temple Attack
subTitle: Major Hanut Singh and NSG commandos risk their lives to save innocent people from the attack of terrorists at a temple in Gujarat.

title: Udta Punjab
subTitle: A rock star, doctor, cop, and labourer battle the chaos of Punjab's drug crisis, each fighting demons as addiction and crime threaten to consume everything.

title: Dil Juunglee
subTitle: Love blossoms between Koroli and Sumit, two people with contrasting personalities, when the latter joins her English class.

title: Jersey
subTitle: Arjun, a talented but failed cricketer, decides to return to cricket in his late thirties driven by the desire to represent the Indian cricket team and fulfil his son's wish for a jersey as a gift.

title: Judgementall Hai Kya
subTitle: Bobby, a dubbing artist who is haunted by a childhood trauma, rents out a portion of her house to Keshav and Rima. However, she repeatedly stalks the young couple and is suspicious of Keshav.

title: Goodbye
subTitle: A family crumbles when the mother suddenly passes away and the children try to rush home to complete her final rites. However, differing opinions cause clashes among the clan.

title: The Sabarmati Report
subTitle: Years after the Sabarmati Express tragedy, Samar Kumar teams up with a novice journalist when the latter stumbles upon a suppressed report, leading to a dangerous quest for the truth.

title: Beyond the Clouds
subTitle: Tara inadvertently sets the wheels in motion for a life-altering, unsavoury occurrence after she seeks help from the wrong person to protect her drug-dealing brother from the police.

title: Beyond the Clouds
subTitle: Tara inadvertently sets the wheels in motion for a life-altering, unsavoury occurrence after she seeks help from the wrong person to protect her drug-dealing brother from the police.

title: Turtle
subTitle: Ramkaran tirelessly churns the dry earth of a village in Rajasthan for water. Meanwhile, the villagers participate in desperate measures to satisfy their thirst.

title: Operation Romeo
subTitle: A young man and a woman in love head out during the nocturnal hours. However, chaos ensues when they meet two strangers on their way.

title: Silence-Can You Hear It?
subTitle: A seasoned narcotics officer is recruited for a special task force. Subsequently, he uncovers shocking truths while investigating a high-profile murder.

title: Iqbal
subTitle: Iqbal, a speech and hearing impaired boy, wishes to play cricket for the Indian team but his impairment overshadows his talent. Thus, he seeks help from a former cricket player to train him.

title: Rock On 2
subTitle: The music band members, once separated due to the conflict, reunite and organise a rock concert, but the local authorities oppose them.

title: Black & White
subTitle: A suicide bomber comes to India with a deadly mission. However, his mind changes after spending time with a professor.

title: Tejas
subTitle: A brave Indian pilot sets on a mission to rescue a spy from Pakistan who holds confidential information and faces her inner fears from the past.

title: Mission Majnu
subTitle: An undercover Indian spy takes on a deadly mission to expose a covert nuclear weapons program in the heart of Pakistan that could destroy the free world.

title: Hamari Adhuri Kahani
subTitle: Half a decade after her husband went missing, Vasudha, a single mother, falls for Aarav, a hotelier. However, her missing husband, Hari, returns, thereby creating a rift between the two lovers.

title: Tumbbad
subTitle: Vinayak Rao, a resident of the village Tumbbad, repeatedly steals the ill-fated wealth of the evil Hastar, until his greed and heinous acts become the reason for his doom.

title: Rashmi Rocket
subTitle: A small-town girl overcomes all societal barriers to become a national-level athlete, but her glory is meaningless when she must undergo a gender test.
